{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321212336F223956830ED867C6693"}"},"total":2694},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7039362116209492773","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"神书啊!肾虚在它面前差点儿文采!斗破在它面前差点儿内涵!诛仙在它面前差点儿感情!遮天在它面前差点儿想像!佛本在它面前差点儿布局!网络小说百年不遇之经典!21世纪最伟大的文学作品!罗贯中施耐奄吴承恩曹雪芹孔墨老庄李杜苏辛秦皇汉武唐宗宋祖一代天骄成吉思汗释迦摩尼柏拉图哥白尼亚里士多德读了都说好!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1638979219,"group_id":"7033021129732131880","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"在失去的所有人中 我最怀念我自己","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6hXdeUDB8tM/jsb13BrAAFRnHOihIiYyCqMkkY/vHV/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/517ec093eaee41ad915123e4b89059da~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616068&x-signature=JaEP%2By4JWmsKzCdGwi%2FSRPkJmAc%3D","user_id":"1063981683573671","user_name":"你还是长安"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1063981683573671","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7033021129732131880","book_info":{"abstract":"改编短剧《反派：女主偷看书评，集体黑化》正在热播中……
王野穿越到书中，获得写书评就变强系统。
【女主，你不对劲儿，你要对男主温柔似水，你要崇拜、爱慕男主…结果，你比我这个大反派还要凶？】
【终于要被男主打脸了，你倒是快点啊，别装逼了，打完我还要玩游戏，没空陪你浪费时间！】
【女主你这人设崩了啊，你应该讨厌我，怎么能帮助我呢？！请尊重一下我大反派的人设成不？】
